$comment: Reef config. Copy to .reef/config.json (or point REEF_CONFIG_FILE at it). All keys optional; a missing/invalid file falls back to defaults. Secrets are NEVER stored here — a provider names the env var its key comes from (apiKeyEnv). Env vars override any single key (REEF_MODEL, REEF_POLICY_FILE).

providers.$comment: Z.ai coding plan (GLM models) via its OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Replace baseURL with the one from Z.ai's docs; set ZAI_API_KEY in the environment. Use e.g. defaultModel: zai/glm-4.6
OpenCode Go subscription gateway (open-source models). Fill in the baseURL from opencode.ai/docs; set OPENCODE_API_KEY. Then e.g. defaultModel: opencode/glm-5.1
